overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through rural farmland at sunset. The character passes horse riders and a wagon while the landscape opens up to reveal a distant town and mountain range in the valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead entrance with dirt road and wooden buildings

events.description: group of three horse riders overtakes and passes the character on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the farm buildings, heading toward the open countryside

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horseback overtaking the ego character at a faster pace
person in orange shirt walking ahead on the path in the same direction

entered.detail: large wooden barn with weathered planks and a sloped roof
massive spreading oak tree with dense foliage silhouetted against the sunset
worn dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the grass
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the farm building
small settlement visible in the valley below with scattered buildings and a church spire

segments.scene_description: The segment opens near a wooden farmstead at dusk, with the character walking along a dirt path. A large oak tree dominates the right side of the frame while farm buildings line the left. Three horse riders overtake and pass the character, heading in the same direction toward the distant town visible in the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling prairie with rock outcroppings overlooking distant valley

events.description: horse-drawn wagon passes by on the left side of the path traveling in the opposite direction
landscape opens up to reveal expansive view of distant town and mountain range as farm buildings disappear from view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens up, passing a rock outcropping on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon with driver traveling toward and then passing the character

entered.detail: large gray rock formation jutting out from the grassy hillside
distant mountain silhouette visible against the colorful sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the farmstead into open prairie land. A horse-drawn wagon passes by in the opposite direction. The landscape opens up to reveal a sweeping view of the distant town and mountains, while a prominent rock outcropping appears on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: remote prairie path with distant mountain backdrop at sunset

events.description: lone horse rider passes by heading in the opposite direction
ambient light dims as the sky deepens to richer purple and orange hues

agents.ego_description: walking through the open countryside as the sunset colors intensify and the path continues toward the horizon

notable_agents.action: lone cowboy riding a white horse, passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: distant abandoned wooden structures barely visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character traversing the open prairie as dusk settles. A lone rider passes by on horseback. The rock outcropping falls behind, leaving expansive grasslands with the mountain range silhouetted against a deepening purple and orange sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered farmstead at dusk into a vast, open prairie overlooking a distant valley. It begins on a dirt path beside a wooden farmstead, where a large oak tree and rural buildings frame the character as three horse riders pass by toward the horizon. As the character moves away from the farm, the enclosed surroundings give way to expansive grasslands, and a horse-drawn wagon crosses the path in the opposite direction. The scene then opens up to reveal a sweeping vista of a distant town and a mountain range, while the camera passes a prominent rock outcropping on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an open prairie as the landscape transitions from a rocky terrain into a vast, twilight expanse. It begins with the character traversing the grasslands, leaving a rugged rock outcropping behind as the path opens up. As the camera moves forward, a lone rider on horseback passes by, blending into the deepening colors of the evening. The scene then expands to reveal the full scale of the prairie, where the horizon is dominated by a distant mountain range. Finally, the lighting shifts into a rich palette of purple and orange as the sun sets behind the silhouetted peaks.
